Fixes the risk-dot colour so it reflects the real update severity.

## Fixed
- **The risk dot now grades a rolling `:latest` update by its real version jump.** Before, a `:latest` container compared `latest` against `latest`, which always looked like a flat "digest" (low/green) or, when a version could not be read, "unknown" (grey) — so even a minor or major update showed grey/green and never orange/red. Now, when ShipLog has resolved both the running version and the newest version, it classifies by that delta: a **minor** bump shows **orange**, a **major** bump shows **red**. Containers ShipLog cannot resolve a version for stay grey; a same-version image rebuild stays a low (green) digest update. (For "breaking changes" inside a minor release, the dot is orange and the AI summary still calls out the breaking items.)

## Install / update
Update from the Plugins tab, or install by URL:
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg`
